subject: A bat-winged vampiric humanoid creature lunges through a dark stormy sky with clawed hands outstretched, ghostly faces swirling in the clouds behind it
description: A winged humanoid creature — gaunt, pale, with large bat-like wings spread wide — lunges forward through a night sky rendered in deep blue-grey. The creature's posture is aggressive and airborne: arms extended, clawed fingers splayed, legs trailing. Its face has an angular, predatory quality with clearly non-human features. In the background, swirling cloud formations contain faint ghostly face shapes, adding supernatural atmosphere. To the right, a tall thin vertical element — a lamp post or building spire — is partially visible. The overall palette is cool blue, black, and grey, with the creature rendered slightly lighter than the surrounding environment.
foreground: bat-winged vampiric humanoid creature lunging forward with clawed hands
background: stormy night sky with ghostly face formations in clouds, lamp post or spire
